2180.full_name: Jabla bin Harithah ibn Sharahil (b. Ka'b) b. 'Abdul-'Uzza b. Zayd b. Imru'ul-Qays al-Kalbi
2180.mother_name: Su`da bint Tha`laba of B. Ma'n
2180.bio: Full Lineage: Jabla bin Harithah ibn Sharahil (b. Ka'b) b. 'Abdul-'Uzza b. Zayd b. Imru'ul-Qays b. 'Amir b. al-Nu'man (b. 'Amir b. 'Abdood b. 'Auf b. Kinana b. Bakr b. 'Auf b. 'Udhra) b. Zayd al-Lat b. Rafayda b. Thur b. Kalb b. Wabra b. Taghlab b. Halwan b. 'Aimran b. al-Haaf b. Quda'a
